key.name: show-section-headers
key.description: When enabled, the account list groups consecutive rows by issuer and renders a small heading above the first row of each issuer run. Vault insertion order is preserved — rows are never reordered for grouping. Disabled by default so the list stays compact.

key.name: show-column-headers
key.description: When enabled, the account list shows the column header strip (Account / Code / Time / Copy / Menu) at the top of the list. Enabled by default so the ColumnView shape is labelled out of the box; users who prefer a compact list can hide it from the Display preferences group.

key.name: show-next-code-column
key.summary: Show the next-code column on TOTP rows
key.description: When enabled, the account list shows a "Next" column between the Code and Time columns; on TOTP rows it renders the upcoming code prefixed with `↪`, and clicking the cell (or pressing Ctrl+Shift+C with the row selected) copies that upcoming code with a toast reading "Next code copied, valid in Xs". HOTP and section rows render an empty cell. The column hides altogether if the rendered list has no TOTP rows even when this key is true, so the column never sits empty. Enabled by default per IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN_04 "Next-code column implementation"; users who prefer a more compact list can hide it from the Display preferences group.
